string.FlatToppedHat: Thanksgiving is coming, hope you have a bountiful harvest this fall!
string.SantaHat: You got a gift from Santa! Happy Feast Of The Winter Star!
string.Hat.Used: You've already used the effect of {{hat}} today!
string.CoolCap.Unavailable: Cool Cap can only be used during the first 3 days of the season.
config.ActiveEffect.Title: Active Effect Keybind
config.ActiveEffect.desc: Trigger the active effect of the current hat, if any. Default is LeftCtrl + Space.
config.ChainPanning.Title: Chain Panning (BETA)
config.ChainPanning.desc: After panning, automatically continue if a new panning spot appears nearby, repeating until no spots remain. Only available when using the mod's panning feature of pan hats.
